title: Fix audition walker URL + proxy port

log.context: Fix audition walker URL + proxy port

All endpoints are correctly proxied — getting `{"error":"walker not found"}` (a proper 404 from persona-audition) rather than 503 from the proxy or the wrong service. The grazing.html URLs were already correct (`AUDITION_URL + '/api/audition/walkers'` = `/api/audition/walkers`), so no changes needed there.

**Summary of what was done:**

- **Root cause:** The `persona-audition.service` unit file sets `PORT=8110` via environment, but the clunger proxy was forwarding `/api/audition/*` to port 8101...(truncated)
